failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the ProductCatalogSearch result list and selected item 2243454707 at $164.46 as the cheapest, even though the returned evidence showed item 1240311797 at $137.17 was cheapest.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle from the ProductCatalogSearch results. The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and was sorted by price ascending. The first item was item_id 1240311797 at $137.17. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item_id 2243454707 at $164.46, which contradicts the tool output and selects the highest-priced listed item instead of the cheapest. This is a reasoning error over tool output, not a malformed invocation, unsupported intent, or missing information.
